POS for these providers, the data now report service lines 
associated with retail clinics and urgent care centers separately rather than collapsing them into 
the other POS category. 

• The data use a new methodology to assign providers to CBSAs based on the zip code reported on 
their submitted claims. 

• Finally, the naming conventions for the MD-PPAS data sets were changed in order to conform to 
new internal documentation standards.
